title: Engine and Other Machine Assemblers
description: Construct, assemble, or rebuild machines, such as engines, turbines, and similar equipment used in such industries as construction, extraction, textiles, and paper manufacturing.

tasks.text: Read and interpret assembly blueprints or specifications manuals, and plan assembly or building operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect, operate, and test completed products to verify functioning, machine capabilities, or conformance to customer specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Position or align components for assembly, manually or using hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify conformance of parts to stock lists or blueprints, using measuring instruments such as calipers, gauges, or micrometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fasten or install piping, fixtures, or wiring and electrical components to form assemblies or subassemblies, using hand tools, rivet guns, or welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove rough spots and smooth surfaces to fit, trim, or clean parts, using hand tools or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out and drill, ream, tap, or cut parts for assembly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rework, repair, or replace damaged parts or assemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble systems of gears by aligning and meshing gears in gearboxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate metalworking machines, such as milling or grinding machines, to shape or fabricate parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and lubricate parts or components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
